data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for dispute resolution evidence storage, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or validation of this specific functionality. The absence of concrete evidence regarding the storage of dispute resolution evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of dispute resolution evidence storage functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add dispute resolution evidence storage validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system stores evidence for dispute resolution.
